nodes.label: Device-Based vs Device-Free Wireless Indoor Localization Taxonomy
nodes.source_file: raw/Xiao et al. - 2016 - A Survey on Wireless Indoor Localization from the .pdf | My Library | Zotero.pdf
nodes.rationale: Classifying localization into device-based (target carries wireless device) and device-free (infrastructure detects impact on signals) clarifies the design space and trade-offs in terms of accuracy, cost, scalability and energy efficiency.
